## Type of Change
- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New feature
- [ ] UI/UX improvement
- [ ] Refactor
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] Deployment

## Checklist
- [ ] `npm run build` passes
- [ ] `npm run typecheck` passes
- [ ] Tested locally with `npm run dev`
- [ ] Commit messages follow format: `Component: description`
- [ ] No hardcoded secrets or credentials
- [ ] Shared components used (not duplicated inline)
- [ ] Design system colors followed
